name: Sweet & Sour Asparagus Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook asparagus in boiling water until tender. Drain.
2. Cook bacon until crisp. Drain and crumble; set aside.
3. In a skillet, combine vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper, and bacon drippings.
4. Add the cooked asparagus to the skillet; heat through.
5. Arrange a bed of lettuce on each of 6 salad plates.
6. Remove the heated asparagus from the skillet and place it on the lettuce.
7. Top with sliced eggs.
8. Pour the hot bacon dressing over each salad.
9. Sprinkle additional crumbled bacon on top.
10. Serve, ensuring each serving is divided among 6 people.
